name: Applesauce Puff
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup brown sugar, omit if cake is used
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the bread or cake with margarine and arrange in a greased baking dish.
2. Mix the applesauce, cinnamon, and half the sugar in a bowl.
3. Beat the egg, skim milk, and the remaining sugar in another bowl until combined.
4. Pour the mixture over the bread or cake.
5. Set the baking dish in a pan of hot water and bake for 40 minutes at 350°F.
Note: Do not set the heat to "kill the temperature" or use any aggressive methods to stop cooking. Simply place the dish in the pan of hot water and allow it to cook until done.
